Home/Local knowledge. Direct responsibility.

Rooted in Khairpur

Local knowledge. Direct responsibility.

Khairpur Date Palm & Nursery operates from Khairpur Mirs and publicly positions itself around palm supply, installation and date-related products.

Speak with the nursery →
CommunityApproximately 29K Facebook followers
CategoryLandscape company
HoursAlways open on Facebook
CollectionRoadside collection listed

Leadership

Tanveer Hussain Kanhar

Founder & CEO

MBA in Business, University of London — 15+ years in Pakistan’s date palm and nursery trade

Tanveer Hussain Kanhar is the Founder and CEO of Khairpur Date Palm & Nursery. He holds an MBA in Business from the University of London and has spent more than 15 years working directly in Pakistan’s date palm and nursery trade — from sourcing and cultivating authentic Aseel and Qarbala varieties in Khairpur, Sindh, to building the supply, delivery and installation services the business runs today. His approach pairs that international business training with hands-on, on-the-ground experience in one of Pakistan’s most established date-growing regions. Under his leadership, the nursery holds to a simple standard: never present a palm, a product or a claim that hasn’t been verified. Tanveer stays directly involved with the field team on selection and planting standards, and remains personally reachable for buyers who prefer to deal with the business owner directly.

“Every palm we send out carries our name with it. That’s why we’d rather tell a customer “not available” than send the wrong plant.”— Tanveer Hussain Kanhar
WhatsApp Tanveer →✉ kanhar4u@yahoo.com

What buyers need to know

01

What we can verify

The company publicly lists Khairpur Mirs, a direct mobile number, email, palm supply and installation.

  • Public contact details
  • Palm and date-product media
  • Authentic installation evidence
02

What we will not invent

Years in business, team biographies, certifications and project totals will be published only after owner verification.

  • No fabricated statistics
  • No invented testimonials
  • No stock images labelled as projects
03

A better digital standard

The website organizes scattered Facebook content into product, service, project and enquiry journeys designed to answer buyer questions.

  • Clear product paths
  • Evidence-backed trust
  • Structured WhatsApp leads

Direct, structured enquiry
